subject: ME /Epidural news
body:
S----,   I,m  going this morning for epidural.  Can't  believe right before 
we are going to New YOrk Sunday. I'm not even packed.   My whole back just kind 
of caved  this week   so i'm giving in  because I have to stop hurting. 
Flying and travelling might be suck but  still planning on going because that is me 
and Bruce working
What is the weather there ?  Am I an idiot or survivor ?
And you ?    call Bruce if you can to make a plan
 
Marcia  M
